titlestmt.titleproper: History of medicine biography reprints and publications
History of medicine biography reprints and publications
titlestmt.author: Kelly A. Perry

publicationstmt.publisher: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday October 29, 2025 at 22:00

did.unittitle: History of medicine biography reprints and publications

corpname.part: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

did.abstract: The collection includes reprints of journal articles and small publications regarding figures associated with medical history. The collection was created by library staff from materials transferred to the Medical Historical Library at an unknown date. Materials are arranged alphabetically by subject or author last names. Some collection materials include markings and/or correspondence indicating previous ownership by people affiliated with the Yale School of Meicine or the Medical Historical Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The collection was created by the Medical Historical Library. Provenance for individual items in the collection is unknown.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: History of medicine biography reprints and publications. Historical Library, Harvey Cushing / John Hay Whitney Medical Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes reprints of journal articles and small publications regarding figures associated with medical history. The collection was created by library staff from materials transferred to the Medical Historical Library at an unknown date. Materials are arranged alphabetically by subject or author last names. Some collection materials include markings and/or correspondence indicating previous ownership by people affiliated with the Yale School of Meicine or the Medical Historical Library.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles about figures in medical history. Arranged alphabetically by subject's last name. Some materials belonged to John Farquar Fulton.

persname.part: Cohen, Henry, Sir (Cohen of Birkenhead, Lord (Henry Cohen)), 1900-
